title: Aureline M1 contribution-governance seed row
description: Boundary schema for one row in the focused M1 contribution-governance seed at artifacts/governance/contribution_governance_seed.yaml. Each row pins one contribution-governance control family (signoff/DCO, per-file license metadata, third-party import provenance, public-interface versioning, deprecation-packet template, repo-hygiene scaffolding), the canonical artifact that carries its contract, the artifact-kind and enforcement-class summaries for that artifact, the lifecycle state, the named runtime consumer that reads the row, and a canonical example payload that the validation lane re-parses end-to-end. Adding an enum value to control_class, artifact_kind_class, enforcement_class, lifecycle_state_class, or contribution_governance_consumer_class is additive-minor and bumps contribution_governance_seed_row_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

contribution_governance_seed_row_schema_.description: Integer schema version for this M1 contribution-governance-row vocabulary. Bumped only on breaking row changes.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short reviewable sentence safe for docs, packets, and the validation lane capture.

path_ref.description: Repo-relative path or document reference. Consumers treat it as opaque text.

owner_dri.description: DRI owning team or maintainer handle in '@handle' form.

control_class.description: Closed control vocabulary for the M1 contribution-governance seed. Each control family stays distinct even when several share the contributing-developer surface.

artifact_kind_class.description: Closed artifact-kind vocabulary. The validation lane asserts artifact_kind_class agrees with control_class through a closed map.

enforcement_class.description: Closed enforcement-class vocabulary. The validation lane asserts enforcement_class agrees with control_class through a closed map (signoff_dco -> ci_required, license_metadata -> repo_hygiene_required, third_party_import_record -> repo_hygiene_required, public_interface_versioning -> release_review_required, deprecation_packet_template -> contributor_documentation, repo_hygiene_scaffold -> contributor_documentation).

lifecycle_state_class.description: Lifecycle state of the M1 row. Seeded rows are the first checked-in form; stabilising rows are under active review; stable rows have ridden one LTS cycle without breaking changes. The M1 seed deliberately excludes deprecated/retired so a contribution-governance row is never silently retired without a superseding row.

contribution_governance_consumer_class.description: What kind of consumer the row's named runtime consumer is. The M1 seed requires at least one consumer per row.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the M1 contribution-governance row shape.

control_id.description: Stable dot-separated id for this M1 contribution-governance row. The prefix MUST match the control_class shortener (signoff_dco -> signoff., license_metadata -> license., third_party_import_record -> import_record., public_interface_versioning -> versioning., deprecation_packet_template -> deprecation., repo_hygiene_scaffold -> repo_hygiene.).

description.description: One-paragraph statement of what this control covers, what it does not cover, and how it is distinguished from sibling controls it shares plumbing with.

canonical_artifact_ref.description: Repo-relative path of the canonical human-readable or machine-readable artifact that carries this control's contract.

canonical_artifact_marker.description: A short literal substring the canonical artifact MUST contain. The validation lane reads the canonical_artifact_ref and asserts the marker is present, so the row cannot quietly point at the wrong document.

supporting_artifact_refs.description: Optional additional repo-relative paths the lane resolves on disk (companion docs, schemas, templates).

example_payload_ref.description: Repo-relative path to the canonical example payload (JSON) under fixtures/governance/m1_contribution_governance_examples/. The example MUST declare registry_example_kind: contribution_governance_seed_envelope_example, schema_registry_row_control_id matching the row's control_id, and pinned_canonical_artifact_ref matching the row's canonical_artifact_ref.
